relationships.description: Decision to implement system-generated financial controls directly fulfills the commitment to restore financial accountability
relationships.reasoningBrief: Both address the same core objective of implementing system-generated controls and accurate financial categorization.

relationships.description: Restructuring bookkeeper/director roles aligns with hiring experienced bookkeeper (Veronique) to implement role clarity
relationships.reasoningBrief: Both decisions work together to professionalize and clarify financial operations personnel structure.

relationships.description: Decision to establish governance framework directly supports commitment to establish clear governance structure
relationships.reasoningBrief: Both items address defining decision authority and governance clarification at the organization.

relationships.description: Restructuring roles with clear job descriptions complements creating written HR policies covering hiring and performance management
relationships.reasoningBrief: Both establish formal personnel management frameworks and documentation.

relationships.description: Hiring experienced bookkeeper helps mitigate loss of key personnel by reducing Danielle's workload and improving organizational stability
relationships.reasoningBrief: Bringing in professional support directly addresses the workload burden causing key personnel flight risk.

relationships.description: Implementing system-generated financial controls and accurate bookkeeping directly mitigates financial mismanagement risks to nonprofit status
relationships.reasoningBrief: System-generated controls directly prevent the financial mismanagement that could jeopardize nonprofit compliance.

relationships.description: Establishing clear governance framework directly mitigates risks from governance gaps and absence of formal policies
relationships.reasoningBrief: Decision directly addresses the root cause of the compliance and legal exposure risk.

relationships.description: Creating written HR policies mitigates legal/compliance exposure and establishes clear performance management expectations
relationships.reasoningBrief: Formalizing policies directly eliminates compliance vulnerabilities and governance gaps.

relationships.description: Strategic planning retreat enables development of explicit operational models for residential programs and revenue streams
relationships.reasoningBrief: Stakeholder alignment retreat is prerequisite for defining detailed operational and financial models.

relationships.description: Financial literacy training improves leadership understanding to support financial accountability restoration commitment
relationships.reasoningBrief: Training builds organizational capacity to understand and maintain financial controls.

relationships.description: Performance improvement plan (ACT004) supports role restructuring decision by documenting expectations
relationships.reasoningBrief: PIP formalizes performance expectations aligned with new role structure.

relationships.description: Restructuring bookkeeper and director roles with clear expectations and performance management reduces turnover risk
relationships.reasoningBrief: Clear roles and expectations address workload/clarity issues contributing to key personnel retention risk.

relationships.description: Role restructuring decision enables implementation of performance improvement plan with documented expectations
relationships.reasoningBrief: Clear role definitions provide framework for fair and documented performance management.

relationships.description: Commitment to restore financial accountability depends on implementation of system-generated controls and accurate categorization
relationships.reasoningBrief: Commitment outcome is contingent on decision execution for systems and controls.

relationships.description: Restructuring roles with clear expectations and performance management reduces operational dysfunction affecting program participation
relationships.reasoningBrief: Clearer organizational structure and accountability help restore operational effectiveness.
